Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 7 (Civil Works) 7 - 110 Table 2. Exterior Finishing Schedule Sl. No. Description of area Walls and protections Soffit of projections 1. Main plant building i) Initial height of 3m (nominal) permanent finish using brick cladding in cement mortar, plastered covered with single sheet of metal cladding. ii) Approved colour/colour combination of colour coated metal cladding for balance height. Resin based textured paint Approved colour/ colour combination of colour coated metal cladding 2. Buildings with concrete frame work Resin bonded granular textured finish and resin based textured paint to match in harmony with the main plant, over plaster of Paris. Resin bonded granular textured finish. Resin based textured paint 3. Steel structures, trestles etc. Specification as specified Note: 1. The colour and pattern of finish sh all be as finalized by purchaser. 2. All materials shall be reputed and esta blished brand approved by purchaser. 3. All the finishing work shall be carried out as per manufacturer specification and approved colour. 4. All the hand rails where ever required shall be of 320mm GI pipe except for main plant building, administrative building and service building wherei n stain less steel raining of 50mm diameter shall be provided. 5. During detailed engineering stage, purchaser may suggest some modifications, which shall be incorporated without any cost implications to purchaser. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 8 (Quality Assurance Plan) 8 - 1 STANDARD TECHNICAL SPECIFICAT ION FOR MAIN PLANT PACKAGE SECTION- 8 (QUALITY ASSURANCE PLAN) 8.1 QUALITY ASSURANCE PROGRAMME All materials, components and e quipments covered under the scope of supply shall be procured, manufactured, erected and tested at all stages as per the comprehensive Quality Assurance (QA) programme.
